project: AMG Aviation Group public homepage cockpit entrance

referenceUse.label: User Image #1
referenceUse.usage: Scroll entrance composition, centered aircraft aperture, split typography. Not used as a production asset.

referenceUse.label: User Image #2
referenceUse.usage: Cockpit/window-to-sky transition pacing. Not used as a production asset.

referenceUse.label: User Images #3-#5
referenceUse.usage: Flight-deck geometry, panels, seats, and cockpit tone. Not used directly as production assets.

selectedAssets.promptSummary: Original large-cabin business-jet cockpit, dark graphite/navy interior, panoramic logo-safe windshield, no logos or readable text.
selectedAssets.selectionReason: Best desktop composition with a clear centered sky aperture and no central windshield post crossing the AMG logo field.

selectedAssets.promptSummary: Original portrait cockpit hero with dark AMG-toned panels, broad centered sky aperture, no logos or readable text.
selectedAssets.selectionReason: Best portrait version with a clean center field, dark side framing, and enough cockpit detail for mobile.

selectedAssets.promptSummary: High-altitude cloud deck, level horizon, cool AMG blue sky, clean center logo field, no aircraft or text.
selectedAssets.selectionReason: Cooler, calmer sky plate with the best desktop logo-safe center.

selectedAssets.promptSummary: Portrait high-altitude cloud deck, cool blue upper field, level horizon, no aircraft or text.
selectedAssets.selectionReason: Best mobile sky crop with clean upper field and stable cloud horizon.

selectedAssets.promptSummary: Slow forward drift through high-altitude cloud tops, fixed horizon, no aircraft, no text, no logo.
selectedAssets.selectionReason: Small enough for optional background motion behind the still sky fallback.

selectedAssets.promptSummary: Portrait slow forward cloud drift, fixed horizon, no aircraft, no text, no logo.
selectedAssets.selectionReason: Small enough for optional mobile background motion with reduced-motion CSS disabled.

rejectedAssets.reason: Strong cockpit tone, but the center windshield post conflicted with the logo-safe field.
Dramatic cockpit, but the central support was too dominant.
Cleaner than earlier desktop candidates, but still retained a center post.
Good portrait cockpit, but a central support ran through the logo area.
Strong cockpit, but less clean for the logo-safe center than the selected final portrait image.
Good desktop sky plate, but less atmospheric and less centered than the selected desktop sky.
Good mobile sky plate, but warmer than the AMG visual direction.
